preamble: Prothesis or glide insertion of [j] often occurs to resolve hiatus or as a strengthening of initial vowels.

examples.note: Development of glide in vowel-initial roots.
Common prothesis in Slavic languages (e.g., historical [e] to [je]).

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
